ogTitle: Cabarita vs Cabbage Tree: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Cabarita and Cabbage Tree.
heading: Cabarita vs Cabbage Tree — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Cabarita, Victoria and Cabbage Tree, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Cabarita has a lower overall climate risk score (29/100) compared to Cabbage Tree (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Cabarita or Cabbage Tree safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Cabarita has a flood risk score of 54/100, while Cabbage Tree scores 50/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Cabarita scores 16/100 for bushfire risk. Cabbage Tree scores 34/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Cabarita or Cabbage Tree?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Cabarita has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.98% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
